verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will sing for all my days Of Your goodness and Your grace And the wonders of Your love for me I will declare Your glory Lord That You died and rose again Now in You I stand Justified

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All of my hope is in You Lord In the saving power Of Your blood

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're my Righteousness My Deliverer I am free and alive 'Cos You live in me I will shout my praise Unto You my King You're my Jesus In You I live
